league.announcement: The L2Detona.com server is under new management.

hero.title: Lineage II Detona has entered a new era: League of Lineage has arrived
hero.description: Choose your class, evolve during the match, destroy towers, win teamfights, and dominate the map in intense instanced battles.

intro.title: League of Lineage
intro.description: League of Lineage is a new competitive mode at L2Detona.com that places two teams of six players against each other in strategic arena battles designed to test skill, coordination, and decision-making.

classes.title: Choose from the available classes
classes.description: Be a Warrior, Mage, or Rogue and try different strategies.

howItWorks.title: Join, evolve, fight, and destroy the enemy Nexus!
howItWorks.description: A fair game style where what truly matters is strategy and player skill.

steps.step1: Select one of the available classes.
steps.step2: Farm the jungle to collect Adena and upgrade your equipment.
steps.step3: Eliminate enemy minions and gain levels to evolve your hero.
steps.step4: Play strategically and help your team gain map control.
steps.step6: Push into the base and finish the enemy Nexus.

servers.title: Discover the available servers
servers.description: L ][ Detona is a long-term project built to last, with an active community and a reliable platform.

envolved.name: Detona Envolved
envolved.description: Interlude 500x server focused on PvP. Our mission is to innovate the PvP scene with exclusive modes.

highFive.name: Detona High Five
highFive.description: H5 20x server focused on progression. Our mission is to bring back the nostalgia of Lineage 2's golden era.

wiki.title: Lineage 2 Wiki
wiki.line2: We have created a knowledge base with information about the most popular versions.

desktopApp.title: Get the desktop app
desktopApp.description: Download the Detona launcher and join our community.
